pattern: DP over elements tracking how many groups are closed and whether the current group is open; closing a group happens between elements, then each element either starts, extends, or is skipped.
hints: Each selected element in group j (1-indexed) carries weight (k+1-j)*sign where signs alternate +,-,+,... Rewrite the objective as a weighted element sum over the chosen elements.
Model the DP with two state arrays: closed[j] = best strength with j complete groups and current element excluded; opened[j] = best strength with group j currently open and current element included.

Process each element in two micro-steps: first allow any open group to close (transition opened[j]->closed[j]), then for each j try starting group j+1 from closed[j] or extending opened[j]. After all elements, close any open group and read closed[k].

edge_inputs.description: k=1, all negatives, pick least negative single element
k=3, exactly enough elements for one element per group
even-indexed groups subtract, so very negative elements there help
classic example: three disjoint subarrays with alternating signs
two elements, k=1, must pick the better single-element subarray

stress.description: medium array with mixed values, odd k satisfying n*k <= 1e6
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(5, size)
    nums = [rng.randint(-100, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    # k must be odd, 1 <= k <= n, n*k <= 1e6
    max_k = min(n, 10**6 // n)
    # pick odd k in [1, max_k]
    k_choices = list(range(1, max_k + 1, 2))
    k = rng.choice(k_choices) if k_choices else 1
    return [nums, k]
